description: Pay-per-call AI: 59 generative models (image, video, music, speech). No signup, no API key.
name: io.github.Gliana-Labs/gliana-ai-mcp

environmentVariables.description: 0x EVM private key for a wallet holding USDC on Base/Tempo — enables the paid generate tool. Discovery tools work without it.
environmentVariables.name: GLIANA_WALLET_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Solana secret key (base58 or JSON array) — enables paying with the solana rail.
environmentVariables.name: GLIANA_SOLANA_KEY

environmentVariables.description: Payment rail for generate: base | tempo | solana (default base).
environmentVariables.name: GLIANA_RAIL

environmentVariables.description: Override the gateway base URL (default https://api.glianalabs.com).
environmentVariables.name: GLIANA_API_URL

title: GlianaAI
